Mission.name: h_1-1_tas_arkbay_liveanddirect
Mission.Title: Live and Direct
Mission.Description:
OK then, looks like everything is in order. [$imp]Check in with Kelly Sweet[$/imp] on the [$loc]Emergence Terrace[$/loc]. She will get you on your way.
As you'll see on your drive, we've got osterakes breeding out of control in the caves. I'm sure no one would mind if their population thinned out a bit. [$emote]Rogers smirks.[$/emote]
[$inst]The orange arrow at the top of the screen is a Waypoint arrow. It points toward your next mission objective. To reach your next objective, follow the arrow.[$/inst]
Mission.NotCompleteText:
[$emote]Rogers waves you off with his free hand, not looking up from his tablet.[$/emote]
Go on, [$name]! Kelly Sweet is waiting on the [$loc]Emergence Terrace[$/loc] for you to check in. She's got to check you through the airlock and get you cleared for release. [$imp]Meet Kelly Sweet[$/imp] on the Emergence Terrace, she'll check you through.
[$inst]The orange arrow at the top of the screen is a Waypoint arrow. It points toward your next mission objective. To reach your next objective, follow the arrow.[$/inst]
Mission.CompleteText:
[$emote]Kelly stands here near the door holding a tablet computer.[$/emote]
Hiya [$name]! I'm Lieutenant Sweet. This is my first day on the job, so bear with me, OK? Looks like we get to go through this together! I got your records from Rogers here on my tablet, so once I verify this stuff I can get you moved through here and out to the Range!

Objective.name: H_arkbay_liveanddirect_1
Objective.ExternalText: Make your way to the first waypoint on your route. The orange arrow at the top of the screen is a Waypoint arrow. It points toward your next mission objective. To reach your next objective, follow the arrow.
Objective.Title: Follow your Waypoint to Kelly Sweet
Objective.DefaultText:
Make your way to the first waypoint on your route.
The orange arrow at the top of the screen is a Waypoint arrow. It points toward your next mission objective. To reach your next objective, follow the arrow.
